title: Graph Databases Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on graph databases and their core concepts.

questions.question: What are the two primary components of a graph database?
Which of these is a popular, native graph database?
What is 'Traversal' in the context of graph databases?
options: Saving a node to the disk
Following relationships from one node to others
Deleting a node from the database

questions.question: For which of these applications is a graph database most appropriate?
What is the main advantage of graph databases over relational databases for complex relationships?
options: Ability to traverse large volumes of relationships without JOIN operations
